description_long: This sculpture depicts a cherubic child with delicate, classical features, seated on a textured base that resembles a natural rock or cloud formation. The figure is nude except for a small drapery around the waist, and has a single visible wing on its back, suggesting an angelic or mythological theme. The child’s head is adorned with curly hair, and the facial expression is serene and contemplative, with the gaze directed downward. The posture is relaxed, with one arm resting on the knee and the other hanging loosely by the side. The surface of the sculpture is smooth with subtle detailing in the hair, wings, and base, giving it a lifelike yet idealized appearance. The material appears to be white marble or a similar stone, contributing to its classical aesthetic.
description: A white marble sculpture of a cherubic child with a single wing, seated on a textured base, featuring detailed curls and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cherubic child’s face, chest, and single wing, with detailed curls and drapery visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the child’s profile, the curvature of the back, and the full length of the legs and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, the single wing, and the textured base, with the head turned slightly to the side.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back, wing, and the child’s arm resting on the base, with the head’s curls prominent.
attribute_subject_matter: cherubic child with a wing (angelic figure)
attribute_location_context: No specific context visible; could be placed in a park, plaza, or garden setting.
